changes.summary: Replaced inline pagination Zod fields in getTransactions and getCommunityMeritHistory with PaginationInputSchema.extend (cursor min(0) kept as procedure-specific field).
Replaced inline pagination in getBirzhaPostsBySource (pick limit/skip), getAll, and getDeleted with PaginationInputSchema.extend (cursor min(1) for infinite-query procedures).

Replaced inline pagination in getFutureVisions, getAll (switched from shared PaginationParamsSchema to PaginationInputSchema + PaginationHelper), getFeed, and getMembers with PaginationInputSchema imports.
No changes — already adopted PaginationInputSchema.extend in getAll.
No changes — canonical schema already defines page, pageSize, limit, skip.

notes: Procedure-specific cursor fields remain via PaginationInputSchema.extend (min(0) for wallet history, min(1) for infinite-query feeds). communities.getAll now uses PaginationHelper.parseOptions for consistent defaults.
